rulings.Case Title: 360 SPEAR LLC VS. MCIMETRO ACCESS TRANSMISSION SERVICES CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiff 360 Spear Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Aug 3, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF 360 SPEAR LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiff 360 Spear Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment DENIED. Multiple triable issues of fact exist including whether demand for payment was made within reasonable time; whether attorney's fees were reasonable. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 360 SPEAR LLC VS. MCIMETRO ACCESS TRANSMISSION SERVICES CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - Summary Adjudication: Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Aug 3, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT MCIMETRO ACCESS TRANSMISSION SERVICES CORP., MCI COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - Summary Adjudication DENIED. There are multiple triable issues of fact including whether merger was a part of a step transaction; whether tax increase was triggered by change in ownership alone; whether merger (as opposed to change of ownership) triggered the increased tax; whether merger increased obligations under the rental agreement; whether defendants have standing to enforce or benefit from the terms of the Prime Lease via incorporation or as a third-party beneficiary. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN DUONG HUANG VS. MICHAEL YOUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Aug 3, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT MICHAEL YOUNG, HUI WU Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED. A partition action may not be properly asserted against a person who claims no interest in property at issue. Verified pleadings before the Court assert specifically that "this answering defendant claims not ownership interest in the subject real property of any kind." Having prevailed on this motion the moving defendant is judicially estopped from ever advancing a contrary position. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. CHANNING CULBERT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Aug 3, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY DEMURRER TO GENERAL DENIAL sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
